citations.quote: The accommodation support service can: ... Provide a dedicated member of staff to provide information and to answer any related queries, or signpost you to a person or service to help you further
ENSA Advice ... free, confidential and independent welfare rights and education advice service run by Edinburgh Napier Students’ Association
Please contact privateaccommodation@napier.ac.uk with your enquiries.

findings.text: NAP-SRC-0014 describes a Private Accommodation Support Service and ENSA Advice but contains no individual records, dates, or references to Anfal.
No evidence in NAP-SRC-0014 that the brochure was provided to Anfal or that Anfal accessed any support service described in the brochure.
This task is limited to source NAP-SRC-0014; other matter sources (e.g., email, case notes, service logs) may contain records of brochure provision or support service access by Anfal.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## Evidence Map: Brochure Provision / Support Service Access by Anfal

### Source Reviewed
- **NAP-SRC-0014** (Private Accommodation Brochure 2025): Describes support services but contains no individual records or references to Anfal.

### Findings
- F-001: Brochure describes services; no individual records.
- F-002: No evidence of provision or access by Anfal.
- F-003: Task scope limited to this source.

### Next Steps
- Search email archives, case notes, service logs, and other matter sources for records of brochure provision or support service access by Anfal.
proposed_artifacts.title: Evidence map for brochure provision / support service access by Anfal

proposed_tasks.instructions: Search available matter sources (e.g., email archives, case notes, service logs, correspondence) for any record that the Private Accommodation Brochure (NAP-SRC-0014) was provided to Anfal, or that Anfal accessed the Private Accommodation Support Service or ENSA Advice. Report any dates, staff notes, or references to Anfal.
proposed_tasks.title: Search email and case note sources for records of brochure provision or support service access by Anfal

risk_flags.text: Absence of evidence in NAP-SRC-0014 does not prove non-provision; other sources must be searched.

summary: Reviewed NAP-SRC-0014 (Private Accommodation Brochure 2025) for records of brochure provision or support service access by Anfal. The brochure describes a Private Accommodation Support Service and ENSA Advice but contains no individual records, dates, or references to Anfal. No evidence of brochure provision or service access by Anfal was found in this source. A follow-up task is proposed to search other matter sources (e.g., email, case notes, service logs) for such records.

uncertainties.text: Whether the brochure was provided to Anfal or whether Anfal accessed any support service is unknown from this source alone.
